title: gypsophila fastigiata subsp. collina
intro: Gypsophila fastigiata subsp. collina, also known as the upright gypsophila, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and relieving anxiety due to its high concentration of flavonoids and essential oils. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as being dried and used in potpourri and perfumes.
